visual_summary: A massive, central open square located within the city of Zodanga. The plaza serves as a monumental urban focal point characterized by vast open spaces and is surrounded by high-raised buildings. It is designed to accommodate large-scale military parades and social gatherings.
layout_notes: Large central square; surrounded by high-raised architecture; wide-open space for massive crowds.
constraints: Must maintain massive scale to accommodate military ceremonies and large crowds.
Must be framed by high-raised buildings.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific architectural style of the surrounding high-raised buildings is not defined.
Exact dimensions or boundaries of the square are unspecified.
